title: Cloudflare Announces Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: Cloudflare reported Q2 2025 revenue of $512.3 million, up 28% year-over-year, with growth accelerating from 26.5% YoY in Q1 2025. CEO Matthew Prince highlighted that Cloudflare crossed $2 billion in annual run rate revenue. Gross margin was 76.3%, and operating income was $72.3 million, with a 14.1% operating margin. Free cash flow was $33.3 million. Customers paying over $100,000 annually increased by 22%. Dollar-based net retention rate improved to 114%, up from 111% in Q1 and 112% YoY, reflecting strong customer expansion. Cloudflare set revenue guidance of $543.5-$544.5 million for Q3 2025, representing a 26-27% year-over-year growth. The company aims to achieve a $5 billion annual run rate by FY2028, driven by continued innovation and operational efficiency.
